mapper.select: SELECT * FROM tb_contractor_plan WHERE deleted = 0 ORDER BY created_at DESC OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{limit} ROWS ONLY
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_contractor_plan WHERE deleted = 0
SELECT * FROM tb_contractor_plan WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
SELECT * FROM tb_contractor_plan WHERE status = #{status} AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY created_at DESC OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{limit} ROWS ONLY
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_contractor_plan WHERE status = #{status} AND deleted = 0
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_contractor_plan WHERE plan_id LIKE #{prefix} + '%'
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tb_contractor_plan ( plan_id, title, work_type, risk_level, work_location, workers_count, work_start_date, work_end_date, work_description, safety_measures, required_ppe, hazard_factors, emergency_contact, notes, checklist_template_id, approver_name, plan_approver_user_id, plan_approver_team, plan_approver_position, plan_approver_name, completion_approver_user_id, completion_approver_team, completion_approver_position, completion_approver_name, repeat_type, repeat_interval, repeat_days, status, total_checklist, completed_checklist, finding_count, modified_by, deleted, created_at, modified_at ) VALUES ( #{planId}, #{title}, #{workType}, #{riskLevel}, #{workLocation}, #{workersCount}, #{workStartDate,jdbcType=DATE}, #{workEndDate,jdbcType=DATE}, #{workDescription}, #{safetyMeasures}, #{requiredPpe}, #{hazardFactors}, #{emergencyContact}, #{notes}, #{checklistTemplateId}, #{approverName}, #{planApproverUserId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{planApproverTeam}, #{planApproverPosition}, #{planApproverName}, #{completionApproverUserId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{completionApproverTeam}, #{completionApproverPosition}, #{completionApproverName}, #{repeatType}, #{repeatInterval}, #{repeatDays}, #{status}, 0, 0, 0, #{modifiedBy}, 0, GETDATE(), GETDATE() )
mapper.update: UPDATE tb_contractor_plan SET title = #{title}, work_type = #{workType}, risk_level = #{riskLevel}, work_location = #{workLocation}, workers_count = #{workersCount}, work_start_date = #{workStartDate,jdbcType=DATE}, work_end_date = #{workEndDate,jdbcType=DATE}, work_description = #{workDescription}, safety_measures = #{safetyMeasures}, required_ppe = #{requiredPpe}, hazard_factors = #{hazardFactors}, emergency_contact = #{emergencyContact}, notes = #{notes}, checklist_template_id = #{checklistTemplateId}, approver_name = #{approverName}, plan_approver_user_id = #{planApproverUserId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, plan_approver_team = #{planApproverTeam}, plan_approver_position = #{planApproverPosition}, plan_approver_name = #{planApproverName}, completion_approver_user_id = #{completionApproverUserId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, completion_approver_team = #{completionApproverTeam}, completion_approver_position = #{completionApproverPosition}, completion_approver_name = #{completionApproverName}, repeat_type = #{repeatType}, repeat_interval = #{repeatInterval}, repeat_days = #{repeatDays}, status = COALESCE(#{status}, status, 'DRAFT'), modified_by = #{modifiedBy}, modified_at = GETDATE() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE tb_contractor_plan SET approved_by = #{approvedBy}, approved_at = GETDATE(), status = 'APPROVED', modified_at = GETDATE() WHERE id = #{id}

UPDATE tb_contractor_plan SET status = #{status}, plan_approved_at = CASE WHEN #{stage} = 'PLAN' AND #{approved} = 1 THEN GETDATE() ELSE plan_approved_at END, plan_approved_by = CASE WHEN #{stage} = 'PLAN' AND #{approved} = 1 THEN #{approvedBy} ELSE plan_approved_by END, completion_approved_at = CASE WHEN #{stage} = 'COMPLETION' AND #{approved} = 1 THEN GETDATE() ELSE completion_approved_at END, completion_approved_by = CASE WHEN #{stage} = 'COMPLETION' AND #{approved} = 1 THEN #{approvedBy} ELSE completion_approved_by END, approved_by = CASE WHEN #{stage} = 'PLAN' AND #{approved} = 1 THEN #{approvedBy} ELSE approved_by END, approved_at = CASE WHEN #{stage} = 'PLAN' AND #{approved} = 1 THEN GETDATE() ELSE approved_at END, reject_reason = CASE WHEN #{rejectReason} IS NOT NULL THEN #{rejectReason} ELSE reject_reason END, modified_at = GETDATE() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE tb_contractor_plan SET deleted = 1, modified_at = GETDATE() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE tb_contractor_plan SET total_checklist = #{totalChecklist}, completed_checklist = #{completedChecklist}, finding_count = #{findingCount}, modified_at = GETDATE() WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM tb_contractor_plan WHERE checklist_template_id = #{checklistTemplateId} AND deleted = 0
mapper.update: UPDATE tb_contractor_plan SET editing_user_id = #{userId}, editing_user_name = #{userName}, editing_started_at = GETDATE() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE tb_contractor_plan SET editing_user_id = NULL, editing_user_name = NULL, editing_started_at = NULL WHERE id = #{id} AND (editing_user_id = #{userId} OR editing_user_id IS NULL)
